name: Onion Bread Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions and green bell pepper in butter until tender.
2. In a bowl, combine 1 egg and milk with the biscuit baking mix; stir well to form a batter.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch by 9-inch pan.
4. Spread the onions and peppers evenly over the dough.
5. Beat the remaining egg with sour cream, salt, and pepper in another bowl.
6. Pour this mixture over the onions.
7. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes.
8. Cut into squares and serve warm.
